data.body: Consideration: [Reliability] CQL syntax error handling — a zero-keyword CQL query (e.g., text ~ "") is syntactically invalid and returns an HTTP 4xx error, not zero results. The zero-results path ('emit warning and continue') handles empty result sets but not API errors caused by malformed CQL from sparse/non-English feature context. The researcher must distinguish between: (a) valid CQL + empty results → emit '[confluence-research: no results]', (b) invalid CQL / API error → emit '[confluence-research: CQL error: <message>]' and continue. (taxonomy: dependency_gaps)
